name: moe_fp8_block_scale_default_routing_topk8_e32_h7168_i2048
description: FP8 block scale MoE with Default routing (Softmax → TopK).

top_k.description: Number of experts to route to per token.

gemm1_out_size.description: Output size of the first GEMM (W13). Should be 2 * intermediate_size.

num_hidden_blocks.description: Number of quantized blocks along the hidden_size dimension (block_size=128).

num_intermediate_blocks.description: Number of quantized blocks along the intermediate_size dimension (block_size=128).

num_gemm1_out_blocks.description: Number of quantized blocks along the gemm1_out_size dimension (block_size=128).

routing_bias.description: Bias added to logits before routing. Pass None for no bias.

hidden_states_scale.description: Block-wise scaling factors for hidden states.

gemm1_weights.description: First GEMM weights for all local experts (gate and up projections).

gemm1_weights_scale.description: Block-wise scaling factors for first GEMM weights.

gemm2_weights.description: Second GEMM weights for all local experts (down projection).

gemm2_weights_scale.description: Block-wise scaling factors for second GEMM weights.

top_k.description: Number of experts to route to per token.

local_expert_offset.description: Offset of local experts in global expert space.

routed_scaling_factor.description: Scaling factor applied to routing weights.

reference:
@torch.no_grad()
def _trtllm_fp8_block_scale_moe_default_routing_reference(
    routing_logits,
    routing_bias,
    hidden_states,
    hidden_states_scale,
    gemm1_weights,
    gemm1_weights_scale,
    gemm2_weights,
    gemm2_weights_scale,
    top_k,
    local_expert_offset,
    routed_scaling_factor,
):
    """
    FP8 block-scale MoE with Default routing: Softmax → TopK.
    routing_bias is added to logits before softmax when provided.
    """
    TOP_K = int(top_k)
    E_global = routing_logits.shape[1]
    logits = routing_logits.to(torch.float32)
    if routing_bias is not None:
        logits = logits + routing_bias.to(torch.float32).reshape(-1)
    s = torch.softmax(logits, dim=-1)
    _, topk_idx = torch.topk(s, k=TOP_K, dim=1, largest=True, sorted=False)
    weights = s.gather(1, topk_idx) * routed_scaling_factor
    return _fp8_moe_run_experts(
        hidden_states,
        hidden_states_scale,
        gemm1_weights,
        gemm1_weights_scale,
        gemm2_weights,
        gemm2_weights_scale,
        weights,
        topk_idx,
        local_expert_offset,
        E_global,
    )
